title: Israel’s Spy Chief Addresses Criticism About the War With Iran
summary_full: The Mossad head said Israel’s mission would not be complete until the Iranian regime was replaced, after criticism that the war has left Iran’s theocratic government in place.
summary_public: The Mossad head said Israel’s mission would not be complete until the Iranian regime was replaced, after criticism that the war has left Iran’s theocratic government in place.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel’s mission would not be complete until the Iranian regime was replaced
